title: WWIII 2024-2032 The World Changes
meta_description: WWIII 2024-2032 The World Changes - [quote]World War III, or the Third World War, or WWIII or WW3, was a worldwide war that lasted from 2024 to 2032. Most of the wo...
contents:
World War III, or the Third World War, or WWIII or WW3, was a worldwide war that lasted from 2024 to 2032. Most of the world's nations participated in the war. Many changes occurred from 2020 to 2024 that basically set up the war such as a worldwide pandemic, a raid on the U.S. Capitol, the rise of the German Empire, many nations leaving the European Union and NATO, Russia going through massive changes, and the collapse of Communist China caused by an uprising. There was also many new major nations that became more powerful after the war, such as Brazil, Italy, and India. Many had felt that from 2020 to 2024 was an era of change. A world where the ideologies and alliances of different nations shifted and massive changes throughout the governments of the world.

https://future.fandom.com/wiki/World_War_III_(TheWorldChanges)
